game.subtitle: Merge & Evolve Animals
game.hint_swipe: Swipe to merge animals and evolve them!
game.hint_swap: Tap the first tile, then the second to swap
game.hint_delete: Tap any tile to delete it from the board

new_game_dialog.title: New Game?
new_game_dialog.content: Your current progress will be lost.

settings.title: Settings
settings.sound_effects_sub: Play sounds on merge and actions

rock.name: Rock
rock.desc: An immovable boulder that blocks movement in its row and column. Cannot be merged with. Use the Delete power-up to remove it.
rock.tip1: Appears once your highest tile reaches level 10+
rock.tip2: Splits a row into two independent merge zones
rock.tip3: Only the 🗑️ Delete power-up can remove it

web.name: Spider Web
web.desc: Traps an animal in a sticky web for 3 turns. The tile is stuck in place and acts as a blocker — it cannot slide or be merged until the web dissolves.
web.tip1: Appears once your highest tile reaches level 5+
web.tip2: Turns remaining shown by the 🕸️ overlay
web.tip3: Counts down every swipe — wait it out or plan around it
web.tip4: Merging is blocked while the web is active

golden.name: Golden Animal
golden.desc: A magical golden animal that can merge with any tile regardless of level. Merges grant 2× score.
golden.tip1: Merges with any adjacent tile — use it on your highest!
golden.tip3: Identified by the gold glow and ✨ icon

lucky.name: Lucky Animal
lucky.desc: A lucky animal that grants double score when merged. Has a 10% chance to award a random power-up as a bonus.
lucky.tip1: Always gives 2× score on the merge
lucky.tip2: 10% chance for a free power-up drop
lucky.tip3: Identified by the green glow and 🍀 icon

sleeping.name: Sleeping Animal
sleeping.desc: An animal that fell asleep! It is stuck for 1 turn and cannot slide or merge until it wakes up.
sleeping.tip1: Stuck for exactly 1 swipe, then behaves normally
sleeping.tip2: Plan your next move around it — do not waste a power-up
sleeping.tip3: Identified by the "z z z" overlay

undo.name: Undo
undo.desc: Reverts the board to its state before your last swipe. Up to 5 moves can be stored in history.
undo.tip2: Earn more by discovering Beetle (lv 4) and Mouse (lv 5)

swap.name: Swap
swap.desc: Tap two tiles to swap their positions. Useful for setting up merges or moving a trap out of the way.
swap.tip1: Works on any two tiles including rocks
swap.tip2: Earn more by discovering Rabbit (lv 7) and Cat (lv 8)

delete.name: Delete
delete.desc: Tap any tile to remove it from the board entirely. The only way to permanently remove a Rock.
delete.tip2: Can also clear a stuck tile instantly
delete.tip3: Earn more by discovering Dog (lv 9) and Fox (lv 10)
